name: pulse
description: Pulse — AI-native mini CRM (Campaign Copilot). Monorepo: web, crm-api, channel-simulator, shared contracts.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @pulse/shared && npm run build -w @pulse/channel-simulator && npm run build -w @pulse/crm-api && npm run build -w @pulse/web
scripts.build:services: npm run build -w @pulse/shared && npm run build -w @pulse/channel-simulator && npm run build -w @pulse/crm-api
